title: Swipe left, previous screen
scenario: Onboarding screen left-swipe navigation stops at second screen and does not proceed to first screen
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time (or after clearing app data) to reach the onboarding flow.
Swipe left repeatedly to navigate through all onboarding screens until reaching the sixth (last) screen.
From the sixth screen, swipe left once — observe navigation back to the fifth screen.
Continue swiping left from the fifth screen — observe navigation back to the fourth screen.
Swipe left from the fourth screen — observe navigation back to the third screen.
Swipe left from the third screen — observe navigation back to the second screen.
From the second screen, swipe left again — observe that the screen does not change and remains on the second screen.
expected: Swiping left from the sixth screen navigates back through screens 5, 4, 3, and 2. Once on the second screen, further left swipes have no effect (the screen stays on the second screen). All screens match the Figma design.
